slack_summary: Quiet Monday with a completely open calendar — your single priority is making real progress on the generated evaluations design doc (AE-1079), which ties directly to the Agents 26.4+ evals deliverable. Urgent housekeeping: Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are both broken, leaving you blind on escalations and product metrics — get credentials fixed ASAP. Zero meetings today.
